{{Quote|Killing stroke ''blocked?'' Not sure that's fair... so many variations at once.|Ship, speaking through the mecho-organic droid|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 38">[[Star Wars (1977) 38|''Star Wars'' (1977) 38]]</ref>}}
The '''mecho-organic droid''' was a drone created by [[Ship (sentient spacecraft)|Ship]] to wield a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] in combat against [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]. At first, Ship thought Luke was merely another simulated opponent, part of the games he played with the ship's computer. When Luke managed to overcome the mecho-organic droid, however, Ship realized that Luke was real.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 38|''Star Wars'' (1977) 38]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 38}} {{1st}}
